spec_match.rationale: The page provides a direct demonstration of requesting maxAlternatives and mapping confidence scores into visual elements.

interactive.rationale: Provides a live microphone capture button, a dynamic slider to modify max alternatives, and renders real-time confidence bar charts.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligns with the parent description, illustrating confidence scoring across multiple alternative transcripts.

edge_cases.rationale: Gracefully catches browser support errors and microphone denials, updating the UI with clear warnings.

references.rationale: The concept page does not include the required chromestatus.com/feature/6090916291674112 reference link.

design_system.rationale: Integrates showcase CSS variables, features highly-readable contrast ratios, and styles its progress bars with emerald green accents.

openQuestions.title: Cite the ChromeStatus entry link on the concept page
openQuestions.detail: The 'see also' section lists internal links but does not cite the official chromestatus.com/feature/6090916291674112 reference link. Add the required external link to fulfill showcase conformance guidelines.
